questionHtml:
What is the name of this compound, using IUPAC rules?

A. 3-methylbutan-3-ol

B. 2-ethylpropan-2-ol

C. 2-methylbutan-2-ol

D. 3-methylbutan-2-ol

meta.title: What is the name of this compound, using IUPAC rules? A. 3-methylbutan-3-ol B. 2-ethylpropan-2-ol C. 2-methylbutan-2-ol D. 3-methylbutan-2-ol
